name: Brother Aldric

special_abilities.name: Blessing of the Faithful
special_abilities.desc: Once per day, Brother Aldric can cast Bless (no spell slot required). He carries a wooden holy symbol of the Church.

special_abilities.name: Sense Evil
special_abilities.desc: Brother Aldric feels deeply uneasy in the presence of undead. He may notice something is wrong with the stranger before others do.

actions.name: Walking Staff
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Sacred Flame (Cantrip)
actions.desc: One creature within 60 ft. must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 4 (1d8) radiant damage. No advantage from cover.

description: A gaunt, elderly monk in mud-stained robes, traveling on pilgrimage to a holy site in the mountains. He clutches a worn wooden cross and mutters prayers when he thinks no one is listening. He will be the first to suspect something supernatural about the stranger.
